Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine Publications Collection 24-4-3390
1 cubic feet. 1 cubic feet.
1904-2015. College publications. Publications of the Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine. Collection material in English 5155983
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Laura Finkel
Date completed:
September 2004
EAD encoding:
Laura Finkel, September 2004
Date modified:
RMC Staff, February 2016
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Publications of the Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine.
Cite As:
Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine Publications Collection, #24-4-3390. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Veterinary colleges. Veterinarians. Veterinary medicine -- Study and teaching. Cornell University. College of Veterinary Medicine
